_comment: MT-076 portable non-SQLite fixture corpus: web portfolio export only. payload seeds materialize ArtifactStore-backed collection media; the rendered manifest must be relocatable (artifact:// refs), use no-space pack paths, and never emit .GOV output paths. Invalid probes assert the portability rejections. All slugs are made run-unique at load time.

collection.notes: MT-076 web portfolio fixture source collection
